full_text:
Huan Fan (Yuanze) 桓範 (元則)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Huan Fan (桓範), styledYuanze (元則). Erudite and known as “Bag of Wisdom”, but his advice was not heeded by Cao Shuang. Huan Fan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Huan Fan lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
